healthy_description: Long slender green and white striped leaves in arching rosettes. Produces dangling runners with plantlets. Vigorous grower.

symptom_guide.visual_description: Dry brown edges on leaf tips, usually starts at oldest leaves, leaves remain otherwise green

symptom_guide.symptom: Yellow leaves and soft mushy base
symptom_guide.visual_description: Lower leaves turn yellow, stems become soft at soil line, leaves may detach easily

symptom_guide.symptom: Pale yellow stippling with fine webs
symptom_guide.visual_description: Tiny mites visible with magnification, fine webbing on stems, overall dusted appearance

symptom_guide.symptom: Brown or tan spots on leaves
symptom_guide.visual_description: Circular lesions with darker edges, spots scattered across foliage
